Plot Effect of Disconnecting Surfaces from Sewer System

Source: R/plot_effect_of_disconnect.R
plot_effect_of_disconnect.Rd

Plot Effect of Disconnecting Surfaces from Sewer System

Usage

plot_effect_of_disconnect(
  surface_reduction,
  type,
  output_dir = NULL,
  width_factor = 10/6.789581
)

Arguments

surface_reduction

reduction of connected surface in percent

type

one of "critical_hours", "unpleasant_hours", "critical_events", "negative_deviation"

output_dir

if NULL (the default), the plot goes into the active device, otherwise the plot is written to a png file within output_dir (must be an existing directory)

width_factor

width factor. Default: 10/6.789581

Value

path to created file (invisibly) if output_dir is not NULL, otherwise NULL (invisibly)
